fieldValues.value:
A stable pointer to a specific definition version.

```typescript
{
  id: UUID
  namespace: string
  name: string
  version: integer   // min: 1
  definitionType?: "field" | "type" | "view" | "schema" | "protocol"
}
```

Canonical string form: `namespace/name@version`

---

sourceRefs.note: Subsection 05-2 from srs-spec.md - coarse source anchoring during migration
